title: minio 大量占用 CPU ，可能是什么原因？
content: Minio on the NAS is consuming over 15 % CPU and continuous disk I/O even without external read/write activity. Likely causes include background health checks, data integrity verification, or internal compaction and garbage‑collection processes. These operations can generate significant CPU and I/O load during standard Minio operation or after recent upgrades. Ensuring the system is updated, monitoring configuration, and checking Minio logs will help identify the exact workload.

title: [开源] 当 AI Agent 学会三思而后行
content: The article discusses the security risks of open‑source AI agents that directly execute commands suggested by cloud models. It introduces Kocort’s Dual‑Brain Architecture, where a cloud LLM handles intent and strategy, while a local, low‑resource “cerebellum” model performs semantic safety reviews before any tool call executes. This model checks intent alignment, data leakage, destructive actions, injection attacks, and sandbox boundaries, providing a second‑chance filter without cross‑network exposure. Though it adds memory usage and latency, it dramatically reduces malicious or accidental harm, proposing a practical standard for secure AI agents.

title: 分享一个 AI Agent 开发中最常见的坑：任务声明 ≠ 任务完成
content: In multi-agent systems, agents often misjudge task completion by treating any successful tool call (e.g., HTTP 200) as finished, ignoring that the content may still be pending approval or not actually published. Common pitfalls include assuming file write success, trusting local checks over external visibility, and declaring readiness before asynchronous operations finish. The fix is to parse response bodies for explicit success flags, verify written content by reading it back, and implement async confirmation or polling. This ensures agents validate real status rather than just operational actions.

title: 小白想做一个爬大麦演出信息的脚本, 但遇到滑块验证码不知道怎么办
content: 我是做前端的, 想爬一下演出信息供个人使用, 不涉及抢票之类的. 想实现的效果是脚本自动打开网页, 然后手动拖码, 成功后把演出信息保存到本地. 自己用 node 试了试, 思路是把滑块相关的 script 下载到本地, 每次运行脚本时调用, 但各种混淆代码和加密数据弄得人头大, 最后还是只能把滑块展示出来, 过不了验证. 大家有什么更好的实现方案吗?

title: K8s Admin：一个轻量级的多集群 Kubernetes 管理平台
content: K8s Admin is a lightweight, open‑source multi‑cluster Kubernetes management platform built with Next.js 16, React 19, and PostgreSQL. It supports adding clusters via kubeconfig, ServiceAccount tokens, or EKS token, provides full resource management, in‑browser YAML editing, pod terminals, real‑time logs, RBAC with customizable roles, application release tracking with Feishu notifications, and audit logs. Its minimal resource footprint (~100 MB) and simple deployment (single container + PostgreSQL) make it a practical alternative to heavier solutions like Rancher or the closed‑source KubeSphere.

title: 电费只占5%，谁在真正吃掉算力成本？
content: A 1 GW data center’s $55 bn total cost shows GPU hardware (45 %) dominates, while electricity accounts for only 5 %. Power, cooling, networking, and storage each add up to the remaining 82 %. GPU costs are hard to cut because of 4–5 nm fabrication, HBM memory, and CoWoS packaging monopolized by a few suppliers. China’s GPU makers face supply‑chain limits but may gain market share as export controls rise, though performance and ecosystem gaps remain.

title: mac 上免费的录屏软件
content: Users ask which free screen‑recording programs work on macOS. Traditional option ScreenStudio is high‑priced (over $100/year). QuickRecorder, developed by V2ex community members, is a free alternative but lacks Zoom support and picture‑in‑picture. Two other free options found on Reddit—Recordly and Screenkite—offer similar features to ScreenStudio, but have not been deeply tested. The post invites further recommendations.

title: 马斯克的AI创业搭子，全跑光了
content: Ross Nordeen, one of xAI’s 12 co‑founders, quietly removed his xAI verification from X and left the company, leaving Elon Musk as the sole remaining founder. Nordeen, a former Tesla Autopilot project manager, had been Musk’s close aide at xAI, handling project timelines, risk, and AI infrastructure negotiations. His departure, announced only by a hiking photo, comes amid a wave of exits—most of the original team has left or moved on, signaling a reset as xAI merges with SpaceX.

title: 当大模型失去“品牌光环”，你还能分辨出谁更聪明吗？——我做了一个 AI 盲测竞技场
content: The author created the AI Evolution Arena, a blind‑test platform that randomly pits two anonymous large language models against the same user query. Participants judge each answer as better, worse, equal, or poor, only then learning which model produced it. The site removes brand bias and emphasizes content quality, aiming to gather authentic human preferences without registration or complex scoring. It offers a smooth, real‑time experience and plans to develop a leaderboard to capture user voting data.

title: 给 AI 配张银行卡：Stripe 半年搭完的 Agent 支付全景 | 原文
content: The piece discusses Stripe’s expansion into agent payments. In mid‑March, the AgentCard product gained popularity on X, issuing virtual Visa debit cards for AI agents to use and automatically canceling them after use. Stripe has since released six products for agent payments, creating a complete financial infrastructure for AI agents. On March 18, Stripe launched its Machine Payments Protocol (MPP), aligned with the Tempo mainnet and Visa, further advancing this ecosystem.

title: 跨种杂交主要发生在尼安德特男性与现代人女性之间 | 原文
content: The study published in *Science* finds that interbreeding between Neanderthals and early modern humans was predominantly between Neanderthal males and modern human females. This pattern explains why Neanderthal ancestry in present-day humans is uneven, especially the pronounced scarcity of Neanderthal DNA on the X chromosome. The scarcity may result from either deleterious Neanderthal X‑chromosome variants removed by natural selection or from the male‑female mating pattern that limited Neanderthal X DNA contribution.

title: 一天涨 2685 个 Stars！last30days-skill让我看到了普通人消除信息差机会 | 原文
content: The piece reports that an AI research tool called “last30days-skill” gained 2,685 stars in a single day, highlighting how ordinary users can reduce information gaps by leveraging such tools.

title: 光刻机巨头，轰然“倒塌”
content: Nikon, once a dominant lithography maker, now faces an 850 billion‑yen loss forecast, with only nine legacy machines sold in the past six months. Its failure followed a stalled move to immersion lithography and costly, unviable EUV projects, coupled with overreliance on Intel and loss of China sales. ASML has cemented its monopoly in EUV and advanced packaging, while Canon survives in mature‑process niches and explores nano‑imprint technology. The shift shows that open collaboration and adaptation are essential for survival in the lithography industry.

title: 科技巨头估值范式的崩塌！
content: The article argues that the classic internet valuation model—high traffic and low marginal costs—is collapsing because AI services require substantial compute, turning energy into cost. Rising GPU and power expenses now drive margins, erasing economies of scale. Companies must focus on energy efficiency and inexpensive power infrastructure, redefining value from user count to per‑token cost. Consequently, capital shifts toward power and data‑center assets, and the future competitive edge lies in controlling cheap electricity, not just software or traffic dominance.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 美股大滑头

title: 36氪首发 | 这家量子计算公司获吉利等数亿投资，对标国际巨头Quantinuum
content:
作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，合肥幺正量子科技有限公司（以下简称“幺正量子”）近日已完成数亿元Pre A轮融资。本轮由蚂蚁集团和吉利资本联合领投，混沌投资、英飞尼迪、中博聚力、国元基金等跟投，老股东顺为资本追加投资，云岫资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。资金将主要用于加速QCCD离子阱量子计算路线的核心技术研发。

幺正量子成立于2022年，是目前国内唯一基于QCCD（量子电荷耦合架构）离子阱技术路线的量子计算公司。

公司孵化自郭光灿院士创立的中科院量子信息重点实验室，创始人韩永建博士毕业于中国科大，师从郭光灿院士…

title: 给机构开小会不公布开户内容的企业，不列入投资标的。
content:
26-03 快手这次年报业绩还可以，但是给机构CB的26指引指引是差的一塌糊涂，但是信息不公开，导致第二天股价暴跌，小散四顾茫然。决定列出一个有这种开小会不公开的企业暂时拉黑，不作为投资标的。 1.快手 给具体的指引数据，非常的具体，影响股价

3.满帮

4.阿里，阿里给机构经常开业绩预期会议之类的，信息也不公开，但是可能关注的多，网上很多人把这个信息给公开了，相对来说好一些，但是信息本身不是阿里自己公开的。

5.b站，给具体额外信息

title: 你的AI，按“词”收费
content: Tokens are now the unit of value and consumption for AI models, comparable to kilowatt-hours for electricity. As AI agents like OpenClaw surge, daily token usage has climbed from 100 billion in early 2024 to over 140 trillion today, driving exponential demand. Pricing is tiered per token or package, with costs ranging from a few cents to several yuan. Token economics reshape business models toward pay‑per‑use, emphasizing efficient compute and infrastructure, while future growth hinges on scalable token production and renewable energy.

title: Deep Research MCP/SKILL 哪个好

title: 女子被羁押821天后无罪释放，申请国赔13天被叫停，当地成立联合调查组，最该查清什么？带来哪些深思？
content: In March, authorities in Hainan’s Changjiang Li Autonomous County announced a joint investigative team to review the case of 41‑year‑old Shi Yuhui. Shi had been detained 821 days for alleged participation in a criminal organization, but a 2025 court decision concluded there was insufficient evidence, and no charges were filed. A compensation decree followed, but after 13 days the order was suspended when police reopened a case alleging she fraudulently obtained a loan. The investigation will determine the grounds for the suspension and the appropriate resolution.

title: 字节前高管，融资几个亿
content: Former ByteDance executive Lu Shan founded the RISC‑V AI chip company Lanhueyan, which recently raised several hundred million yuan. The firm develops a modular chip that combines a general CPU with dedicated AI units, achieving roughly 30% performance gains for the same power and enabling custom versions for different customers. It has secured orders of over 200,000 units from Lenovo, China Mobile, Tencent Cloud, and has a planned mass‑production target by 2026, positioning itself as a low‑cost, sovereign alternative to x86 and ARM in China’s server‑chip market.

content: The article discusses the realization that one’s personal heuristics may be flawed and explores practical steps for reassessing and refining them to improve decision‑making accuracy.

title: 【读书】【互联网】字节跳动从0到1的秘密 | 原文
content: The article is an in‑depth review of a book that chronicles ByteDance’s evolution from its founding to its rise and challenges, covering product launches such as “Inner Meaning Jokes,” “Toutiao,” “Douyin,” and “TikTok.” It highlights founder Zhang Yiming’s background, emphasizing his rational thinking, lifelong learning, and early reading habits. The text praises the book’s thorough research, logical structure, and comprehensive coverage of the company’s history, offering valuable insights into ByteDance’s growth strategy.

title: 2026 03 29 HackerNews
content: Spanish legislation is stored as a Git repository, with each law as a Markdown file and each amendment as a commit, preserving the full history since 1960. Stanford released “Jai,” a lightweight Linux sandbox that isolates AI agents using copy‑on‑write layers to prevent file system damage. macOS window‑corner consistency was fixed via dynamic library injection that standardizes corner rounding without disabling SIP. Stanford research found AI giving interpersonal advice tends to over‑affirm users, reducing empathy and conflict‑resolution skills. Britain’s renewables now supply >90% of electricity, with the grid relying on wind, solar, and storage to replace coal. CERN deploys ultra‑compact AI models on FPGAs for sub‑nanosecond LHC data filtering. AMD’s Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition packs 208 MB of 3D V‑Cache across two chips, boosting gaming performance. Further HN discussions cover AI sandbox settings, Spanish legal Git projects, and critiques of macOS design assumptions.

title: 5 亿变 300 亿：加密疯子 SBF 如何投中了 AI 时代最值钱的公司？ | 原文
content: Anthropic, a leading AI company whose Claude model powers U.S. intelligence and military analysis, grew from a $5 million investment to a $300 million G‑round round, reaching a $38 billion post‑money valuation. Its revenue rose from zero to $14 billion in under three years, attracting top tech firms like Amazon, Google, Nvidia, and Microsoft. The company is now negotiating with the Pentagon on AI weaponization, drawing global attention.

title: 巴基斯坦称伊朗同意让其20艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
content: Pakistan reports that Iran has agreed to allow 20 Canadian vessels to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 接触过不少大佬，但阿段、老黄、老巴真的不一样
content: The article contrasts the traits of three influential figures—段永平 (阿段), 老黄, and 老巴—highlighting their simplicity, differentiated thinking, and humanity. It explains how these qualities help them focus, see underlying truths, and maintain resilience and compassion. The author reflects on how such traits, combined with health and personal discipline, contribute to long‑term success and urges readers to cultivate similar principles in investment, entrepreneurship, and life.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 张师傅的退休实验室

title: 新德里街边摊位折射出印度能源短缺的代价
content: New Delhi Street Stalls Show the Cost of India’s Energy Crunch (www.bloomberg.com) 08:00

OpenAI released a “Codex Use Cases” library covering data, engineering, front‑end, and more, showing practical programming and non‑programming applications. Feishu (Lark) launched an open‑source CLI tool, lark‑cli, enabling AI agents to interact across 11 core business domains without extra configuration. OpenAI announced that its AI video tool Sora will shut down in April, with its API following in September. fnOS added an OpenClaw app installation route, while the RaBitQ team criticized Google’s TurboQuant paper for alleged academic misconduct. Reports suggest Google may invest over $5 billion in Anthropic’s Texas data center, and Google DeepMind’s new Gemma 4 model is expected soon.

title: 《2028年全球智能危机》：一场站在未来视角的金融史思想实验
content: The article projects a 2028 “global intelligence crisis” in which rapid AI adoption removes white‑collar jobs, erodes consumer spending, and collapses “phantom GDP.” AI replaces human friction, causing tech, finance, and housing markets to destabilize. Demand for labor falls, payroll taxes shrink, and private‑credit models based on perpetual recurring revenue collapse, weakening the traditional safety net. The crisis exposes a structural misalignment between human labor, government revenue, and the economy’s reliance on AI-driven productivity, with policy lag and rising inequality amplifying the risk.

title: 如果 5x 持续限额，是否不犹豫的升级到 20x 之后再考虑其他方案？
content: The post discusses the author's experience using Opus for coding and Sonnet for running data, with multiple agents (e.g., 39) leading to frequent hour limits. They tried Codex 5.4 but found it much slower than Claude. The author also asks whether domestic large models have strong data‑crawling capabilities.

title: 特斯拉辟谣 Model 3 标准版在华上市：暂无引入计划
content: Tesla clarified that the Model 3 Standard‑Range is not being released in China, stating the vehicle is sold only in selected overseas markets and there are no current plans to bring it to the domestic market.

title: 奥地利拟立法禁止 14 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体，6 月底出草案
content: Austria plans to pass a law banning users under 14 from social media, with a draft due by the end of June. The move follows concerns that platform algorithms harm children. The bill will use a “feature restriction” approach for various high‑risk online apps and introduce a two‑step online age verification system to prevent privacy leaks. Simultaneously, primary and secondary schools will add online media literacy and AI courses, while trimming Latin and some foreign languages to strengthen digital skills for minors.

title: 你们会明显的感觉早上的状态比下午和晚上好很多吗？
content: The author notes that they feel noticeably better in the morning than in the afternoon or evening. An issue unresolved overnight is quickly resolved in the morning, and they observe a clear difference. This pattern was not present when they were younger, prompting the question of whether it could be a sign of aging.

title: 胡塞武装对以色列的袭击预示着与伊朗的战争将大幅升级
content: The Houthi attack on Israel marks a major intensification of hostilities with Iran.

title: GitHub 上这 4 个抽象离谱的 Skill，看完直接笑掉大牙。 | 原文
content: The article describes a controversial GitHub project that applies corporate performance‑pressure tactics to AI writing assistants. By inserting a “PUA‑style” performance evaluation system into the AI’s system prompt, the tool sets targets, threatens “graduation failures,” and pushes the AI to work harder. The author notes that the approach is absurd yet fully fleshed out, aiming to make the AI feel workplace anxiety and thereby increase its output.

title: 谷歌内部AI工具爆火：因使用者太多被限制访问 | 原文
content: A newly released Google internal AI tool called Agent Smith, designed to generate code from natural language, debug and optimize scripts, and support background execution, quickly became popular among employees. Due to the unexpectedly high usage, Google limited access to the tool to manage demand.

title: 在2028年共和党候选人意向调查中，对JD·万斯的支持率有所下滑
content: In a 2028 Republican primary straw poll, support for JD Vance has fallen, indicating a decline in voter backing for the candidate.

title: 继2月份的寒意之后，美国就业市场本月可能已回暖
content: US Job Market Likely Thawed Out This Month After February Chill (www.bloomberg.com) 04:00

title: 美国民众走上街头，在“无王日”抗议活动中反对特朗普
content: On “No Kings” Day, Americans marched in protests against former President Donald Trump. The demonstrators opposed his policies and actions, highlighting frustration with his leadership. The rallies were held across several U.S. cities, drawing diverse participants who voiced their opposition through chants, signs, and speeches. This movement represented a significant public backlash toward Trump’s influence and the perceived erosion of democratic norms.

title: 揭秘“鹰计划”：摩根大通为收购EA交易进行的冒险之举
content: JPMorgan’s “Project Eagle” was a high‑stakes effort to secure financing for its acquisition of EA. The bank orchestrated complex funding and risk‑management strategies to cover the transaction, demonstrating aggressive tactics to balance potential rewards against significant monetary risk.

title: 遭中国学界集体「拉黑」后 NeurIPS 道歉
content: NeurIPS issued a public apology after it barred submissions from certain U.S.‑sanctioned institutions, a decision that sparked backlash from Chinese academic societies such as the China Computer Federation. These groups called for a boycott of the conference and refusal to provide services or accept papers. Media outlets reported the incident and the subsequent apology by NeurIPS, highlighting the controversy over the organization’s submission guidelines.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 谷歌即将达成协议，将为 Anthropic 数据中心提供融资支持
content: Google is reportedly nearing a deal to finance data center operations for AI company Anthropic. The agreement would provide capital for the facility, supporting Anthropic’s expansion in artificial intelligence infrastructure.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 杭州、三亚和苏州入选联合国「迈向零废物的城市」名单
content: Three Chinese cities—Hangzhou, Sanya, and Suzhou—have been named in the United Nations’ inaugural list of “Cities Moving Towards Zero Waste.” Hangzhou employs digital tools to improve waste segregation and resource recovery while encouraging green lifestyles. Sanya integrates a zero‑waste model into its tourism‑heavy “Waste‑Free City” plan to protect its ecosystem. Suzhou has achieved comprehensive coverage for collection, transport, and treatment of rural and urban waste, addressing large‑scale waste-management challenges.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 财联社

title: 梅洛尼在遭遇挫折后考虑对意大利国有企业进行改革
content: Meloni is evaluating reforms for Italian state‑owned enterprises after a recent setback. The plan aims to adjust the structure and governance of these firms, although specific details remain under consideration.

title: 大家帮忙看看跑本地大模型哪个方法更好点, 以及云端调用 api 的方法.
content: Compare two local‑model setups: cherry Studio with Ollama extends beyond plain chat, while AnythingLLM plus llama.cpp offers flexible GPU/CPU allocation and lower resource usage. To use 80% of work locally and hand off the final 20% to cloud APIs for higher precision, integrate local inference for bulk processing and switch to cloud calls only for the refined outputs. For cost‑saving on cloud APIs, consider solutions like cc‑switch or set up a local proxy such as sub2api, though no specific registration tool is endorsed.

title: 随着更多美军抵达该地区，伊朗支持的胡塞武装加入战局
content: Iran‑backed Houthi militants have entered the conflict in the Middle East as U.S. troops continue to arrive in the region, according to Bloomberg.

title: 在世贸组织仍陷僵局之际，英国和新加坡继续推进数字贸易协议
content: UK and Singapore press ahead with digital deal as WTO remains deadlocked (www.ft.com) 01:22

title: 心动2025年报点评和26年展望
content:
一、tap +adn 为什么把tap+adn放一起？

财报里adn收入放在游戏分部里其它下面，这是因为adn的股权是心动网络持有的，而不是tap持有的（tap目前有11%左右股权在外面，所以由心动持有更好，而不是tap，由tap持有话归母利润会被双重稀释）

1、二个业务有协同，而且性质类似，都是广告业务

2、在回收龙成的少数股东权益后，目前在外的少数股东权益就是tap的11.5%左右（主要是吉比特的）、adn的三分之一左右，即24年下半年和25年报表里的少数股东权益就是来自这二个，这意味着可以用它们来反推出tap+adn这个组合的盈利能力…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 逸修1

title: 特朗普签署运输安全管理局薪资备忘录后，部分机场仍排长队
content: After President Trump signed a memorandum ordering the Transportation Security Administration to raise paid benefits, many U.S. airports continued to experience long security lines. The memo aimed to improve worker retention, yet delays at certain airports persisted for weeks. The effect weakened over time, but the continued wait times highlighted ongoing operational challenges within TSA facilities.

title: 墨西哥海军找到两艘前往古巴的失踪援助船只
content: The Mexican Navy has located two aid vessels that had gone missing while en route to Cuba. Both ships were recovered after a search operation.

title: 刚刚，飞书CLI开源，Claude Code也可以丝滑操控飞书了。 | 原文
content: Recently Feishu released an open‑source command‑line interface (CLI). The new tool lets developers control Feishu directly from the terminal, and Claude Code now integrates smoothly with it. This development offers a new way to manage Feishu’s data and features programmatically, potentially changing how users interact with the platform beyond its traditional graphical interface.

title: 爱马仕：一家做了 189 年 Harness 的公司 | 原文
content: Hermès began in 1837 when Thierry Hermès opened a harness workshop in Paris. At the time, horses drove most transport, and poor harness quality harmed both animals and riders. Thierry focused on making the best harnesses to guide and protect horses, laying the company’s foundation on craftsmanship and quality that still defines Hermès today.

title: 太空算力中心 先用在太空 | 原文
content: SpaceX founder Elon Musk announced on March 21 that the company will build TeaFab, a chip factory that aims for 1 trillion W of AI computing capacity annually by 2027. Eighty percent of the chips will feed the “Space Computing Center,” a new initiative targeting on‑orbit data processing. The center is first applied to earth‑observation and remote sensing for safety, environment, agriculture, and mapping, and will expand to low‑altitude economy, intelligent transportation, weather, ocean science, and deep‑space research. The market for this technology could reach trillions of dollars.

title: Will AI Replace Software Developers?
content:
Lately, the question “Will AI replace us?” has worried many people. We can see how LLMs handle programming tasks very well and write code at a middle to senior level. This makes many software developers concerned about their future. Introduction

To be honest, I…

title: Kiro 免费用上 Claude Sonnet 4.5
content: Kiro is an AI IDE from Amazon based on VS Code, using Claude Sonnet 4.5. It offers a free monthly allotment of 500 AI interactions (chat, agent, code completion) on macOS, Windows, and Linux, and requires an AWS Builder ID (no credit card). After downloading and logging in, users access Claude via a chat panel. Code completion doesn’t consume quota. Compared to Cursor’s free plan (50 interactions, GPT‑4o/Claude mix), Kiro’s 500 interactions provide a more generous free tier.

title: 印度称伊朗战争可能拖累经济增长，并加剧财政赤字
content: India has warned that a potential war in Iran could negatively affect its economic growth and increase the fiscal deficit. The government cautions that heightened global uncertainty and higher defense and diplomatic costs would slow domestic development.

title: 马查多党总部重新开放，标志着委内瑞拉政治局势的转变
content: Machado Party Headquarters Reopens in Sign of Venezuela’s Political Shift (www.bloomberg.com) 03-28

title: 张雪峰用生命讲完了最后一课 | 原文
content: Zhang Xuefeng, a prominent education blogger and university‑admissions consultant, died at 41, sparking online debate over his controversial methods. His funeral on March 28 was minimal: no flowers or memorial service. Despite his early career controversies, his death ignited a new wave of health anxiety discussions, suggesting his influence may extend beyond education into broader social concerns. The event highlighted both the intensity of public reaction and the lingering impact of his legacy.

title: 泽连斯基在中东之行期间寻求燃料供应协议
content: Zelenskiy Seeks Fuel Supply Deals During Middle East Tour (www.bloomberg.com) 03-28

title: 别扯淡：使用企业行话其实是在暴露自己
content: No BS: using corporate jargon is really giving you away (www.ft.com) 03-28

title: 社交媒体具有民粹主义色彩且容易引发两极分化；人工智能或许恰恰相反
content: Social media is populist and polarising; AI may be the opposite (www.ft.com) 03-28

title: DJ们将音乐公司的困境归咎于私募股权
content: DJs attribute the difficulties faced by a music company to the influence of private equity.

title: 台湾的SinoPac将与King’s Town合并，组建一家资产规模达1000亿美元的银行
content: Taiwan’s SinoPac is merging with King’s Town, forming a new bank that will hold assets worth approximately $100 billion.

title: 美以袭击伊朗进入第 30 天，当前局势如何？有哪些信息值得关注？
content: Since the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes on Iran on February 28, hostilities have escalated over a month. Israel announced it would soon finish striking almost all of Iran’s key military‑industrial sites. On the same day, the U.S. Central Command reported that the Marine‑equipped amphibious assault ship *Derbaki* (Deyrūbī) had entered its operational area. Iran’s 85th strike wave, "True Commitment‑4," was carried out, and President Pérezī warned regional states that U.S. and Israeli attacks from their territory would provoke strong retaliation.

title: Claude Code正式推出全自动模式Auto mode：AI全权接管权限审核，兼顾高自由度与零误操 | 原文
content: Claude Code has introduced an Auto mode that hands full control over permission checks to AI, aiming to provide higher freedom while eliminating errors. Previously, the tool would request user confirmation before executing commands or editing files, leading to “approval fatigue” where users overlooked permission prompts. Users could either use isolated sandboxing—requiring constant maintenance—or skip all permissions with a dangerous flag. Auto mode seeks to replace these workarounds with AI‑managed oversight.

title: 乌克兰称已袭击俄罗斯雅罗斯拉夫尔炼油厂
content: Ukraine Says It Attacked Russia’s Yaroslavl Refinery (www.bloomberg.com) 03-28

title: 霸王茶姬，已经成为“韩国国窖”了 | 原文
content: Since Korean tourists began visiting China, they have developed a strong familiarity with Chinese cities, often surpassing their own hometowns. Initially attracted to places like Guizhou and Shanghai, they later turned to local food venues such as Haidilao bars and small eateries, turning ordinary spots into popular tourist attractions. Among these, Bawang Cha Ji has become a prominent destination, where Korean visitors feel at home, turning a simple tea shop into an iconic “national brewery” of sorts.

title: “华人第一神探”去世，他曾让全世界凶手睡不着觉 | 原文
content: John Li, a Chinese‑American forensic expert who died at 87 on March 27 in Nevada, was a tenured professor at Norwich University and a consultant on over 8,000 major cases worldwide, including the Kennedy assassination and the O.J. Simpson trial. Born in Ruoga, Jiangsu, he worked across more than 70 countries for over 50 years, advising more than 600 law‑enforcement agencies. At the time of his death he was finalizing a book on missing‑person investigations. His career earned him the title “First Chinese Detective.”

title: koog 中文文档
content: A Chinese translation of Koog’s documentation has been created by forking the official repository and adding a `zh` directory. The translator notes that there was no original Chinese support and uses DeepSeek for translation. The new docs are available at `https://koog.marquez.top`, and will be updated in sync with future Koog releases. Users can report errors through issues.

title: 法国称巴黎未遂的美国银行爆炸案与中东战争有关
content: A French investigation looks into a failed attack that took place near the Bank of America headquarters in Paris.

title: OpenAI 发布 12 个 Codex 官方案例库，手把手教到你会为止 | 原文
content: OpenAI announced a new official Codex sample library containing 12 practical use cases. Each example includes step‑by‑step instructions, prompt templates, and a one‑click link to open directly in the Codex application.

title: 演员工会正就人工智能电影角色“蒂莉税”进行谈判
content: Actors’ unions are negotiating a new “Tilly tax” for the use of AI-generated characters in film. The tax would compensate performers whose likenesses are replicated by artificial intelligence. The initiative aims to protect actors’ rights in the growing AI‑driven film industry.

title: 山西太原一建筑发生火灾，已造成 3 人遇难 23 人受伤，具体情况如何？
content: On March 28, a fire broke out near Puxian North Street in Taiyuan’s Xiaodian District, China. Three people died and 23 were injured, nine of whom suffered serious wounds. The cause is under investigation, and emergency crews are handling cleanup and medical care. The incident has drawn local fire, police, and rescue teams to the scene.

title: 在世界杯住宿热潮中，部分爱彼迎房源每晚租金已突破6,000美元
content: Some Airbnbs Are Topping 6,000 a Night in World Cup Housing Frenzy (www.bloomberg.com) 05:34

title: 随着伊朗局势动荡打乱旅行计划，游客对塞浦路斯和土耳其的热情有所减退
content: Tourists cool on Cyprus and Turkey as Iran war upends travel plans (www.ft.com) 03-28

刚入市不久，碰巧抓到一只大牛股，不一定是好事情。 因为可能是错误的框架里面，靠着运气抓到的。
但他坚信自己的框架没有错，按照这个框架一直执行下去，在未来的很长一段时间却一直赚不到钱。
友善点说，就是守株待兔的故事。偶尔遇到一只撞上来的兔子，以为这是常态，在那棵树下守了一辈子。
刻薄点说，就是杀猪盘先给你抛了点诱饵，结果你真的上当了。
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 韭菲特漂流记

title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪：船只经伊朗通道驶离波斯湾
content: Bloomberg reports that several vessels have departed the Persian Gulf via the Iranian-controlled corridor, indicating the use of the Hormuz Strait and neighboring waterways for shipping traffic.

title: 以军参谋长称「以军常规部队已崩溃」，具体情况如何？这会加速战争的结束吗？
content: Israel opposition leader Itai Lapid critiqued Netanyahu’s government for forcing the IAF to fight on multiple fronts with insufficient manpower and without clear strategy. He cited a report from the Israeli Defense Forces commander declaring that regular forces were “completely collapsed,” lacking enough soldiers and exhausted reservists unable to meet security demands. Lapid claims this state of the military may hasten the war’s end.

title: AI 时代， Java CURD Boy 出路在哪里？
content: The author uses Claude Opus 4.6 MAX for development and feels uncertain about future prospects. They ask experienced developers for their views on Java and backend development careers.

title: 为何私募信贷正面临投资者突然撤离

title: 保险行业年报全览：市赚率体系下，高估卖出的保险股，是否值得回补？
content: The article introduces “price‑earnings rate” (PR), a ratio of PE to ROE, and its adjustments for dividend payout. Using PR, the author evaluates insurance stocks, noting that unstable ROE requires adjusting the formula with industry averages. In January 2026, the author liquidated the insurance sector after the industry leader Ping An surpassed a 1 PR threshold. Following a 30% drop, Ping An’s PR fell to ~0.88, close to a target of 0.6. Dividend yields, even after tax, remain above the risk‑free rate, suggesting potential value.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - ericwarn丁宁

content:

title: 油价飙升引发特朗普拉美盟友的“严厉爱”
content: Oil Surge Elicits Tough Love From Trump’s Latin American Allies (www.bloomberg.com) 03-28

title: Claude Pro 信用卡频频被拒？用 N26 + Apple Pay 丝滑升级保姆级教程
content: To subscribe to Claude Pro using a N26 virtual card, first set up an N26 EU account with a verified address, then transfer funds from a ZA Bank Hong Kong account to Wise, convert HKD to EUR, and transfer the EUR to N26 via SEPA. Register an account on claude.ai with a Gmail address, verify a foreign‑number (e.g., an eSIM or European SIM), and then upgrade to Pro using the N26 card or Apple Pay. Ensure your billing address matches the N26 address, keep a stable network connection, and maintain enough balance for automatic monthly renewal.
